summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - Barcode generation and updated_at timestamps. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped due to insufficient data). Frontend: All barcode UI features working correctly including preview dialog, print/download buttons, and batch selection.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Customer, Supplier, and Sale models were missing updated_at field - added Optional[str] = None to models.py to include updated_at in API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Barcode feature is fully functional. Only 1 item exists in database (Widget A), so batch PDF test was skipped (needs 2+ items). Company logo exists at /app/backend/uploads/logos/company_logo.png and company_logo.jpg

barcode_preview_endpoint.details: Returns PNG image with company logo, item name, price, and Code128 barcode

barcode_download_endpoint.details: Returns PNG with Content-Disposition: attachment header

barcode_items_list_endpoint.details: Returns list of active items for barcode generation

batch_barcode_pdf_endpoint.details: Returns 400 for empty items, 404 for non-existent items. PDF generation skipped due to only 1 item in database

customer_updated_at.details: updated_at timestamp added on update, now returned in API response after model fix

supplier_updated_at.details: updated_at timestamp added on update, now returned in API response after model fix

sale_credit_receive_updated_at.details: updated_at timestamp added when receiving credit payment

frontend_barcode_preview_dialog.details: Dialog opens when clicking barcode icon in Items table. Shows barcode image with Print and Download buttons

frontend_batch_selection.details: Checkboxes in Items table allow selecting multiple items. 'Print Batch Labels' button appears when items selected

authentication_required.details: All barcode endpoints return 403 without authentication
